edits.rationale: AIQS 3.4.4 was not found in v2 and no similar replacement clause was identified. The clause may have been deprecated — human review required.
edits.old_text: This WI applies to all personnel involved in the FAI process for products manufactured using equipment asset IDs 2847.420.0023 (Injection Molding Unit) and 2847.420.0018 (Hydraulic Press, 12-ton). It encompasses the preparation, execution, and documentation of the FAI in accordance with AIQS 3.4.4.

edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.420.0018 has been superseded by 2847.420.0019 in v2.

edits.new_text: This WI applies to all personnel involved in the FAI process for products manufactured using equipment asset IDs 2847.420.0023 (Injection Molding Unit) and 2847.420.0019 (Hydraulic Press, 12-ton). It encompasses the preparation, execution, and documentation of the FAI in accordance with AIQS 3.4.4.

edits.rationale: AIQS 3.4.4 was not found in v2 and no similar replacement clause was identified. The clause may have been deprecated — human review required.
edits.old_text: 3. Execute the FAI by running a sample batch using both the Injection Molding Unit (2847.420.0023) and the Hydraulic Press (2847.420.0018). Measure critical dimensions and compare them against the specifications. Document any discrepancies and generate a Nonconformance Report (NCR) if necessary, in accordance with AIQS 3.4.4.
